title: BEISHIDA 500 Yards Gold Crimped Curling Ribbon Shiny Metallic Balloon String Roll Gift Wrapping Ribbon for Party Festival Art Craft Decor Florist Flowers Decoration
features: Wide range of usage: you can apply the curling ribbon for crafts making, wedding party, scrapbooking, Christmas decoration, flowers, gift wrapping, DIY and any other occasions.
Bright and attractive: the ribbon is in gold color, with holographic sparkles, very shining and glossy, helping to enhance your festival or party atmosphere
Curling ribbon measurement: the curling ribbon is 5 mm in width and 500 yards in total length, enough for using, made of plastic, quality and durable for long usage life
Quantity: the package includes 1 roll of curling ribbon, wrapped around a plastic spool, easy for using and storing, in case of getting twined or be in sruck.
Note: winding risk, adult supervision is required; You can not use the ribbon to tie the balloon directly to avoid air leakage, just use the ribbon to decorate your balloon.
